meta.title: CareMetrics - BI and Analytics for Dental Clinics, Focused on Treatment Quality
meta.description: CareMetrics gives you granular treatment and outcome data for follow-up—unlike most EHRs, which are economy-focused. Structure data, follow up on quality, improve your treatments. BI for practice and quality management—not a medical device.
meta.keywords: dental BI, treatment quality, dental analytics, outcome data, dental clinic Sweden, quality follow-up, treatment follow-up, dental practice management, vårdkvalitet tandvård

hero.title: BI and Analytics for
hero.description: CareMetrics is built for treatment follow-up and quality—with granular outcome data that most EHRs don't provide because their data is economy-focused. Structure your treatment and outcome data, follow up over time, and get insights to improve your treatments.

features.title: What CareMetrics Offers
features.subtitle: CareMetrics connects your clinical episodes with outcome and referral data and turns them into ready‑to‑use quality analytics. Register treatments and outcomes once, then explore interactive dashboards instead of exporting to Excel.

dataValidation.title: Treatment & Outcome Episode Capture
dataValidation.description: Register episodes with diagnosis, therapy, tests, referrer, tooth, technical outcome and symptom outcome in one place. Capture birth date and visit date so you can analyse age groups and time trends without extra spreadsheets.

qualityScorecards.title: Quality Distribution Views
qualityScorecards.description: Ready‑made distribution charts for diagnoses, therapies, tests, technical outcomes, symptom outcomes, primary cases and more. Switch between table, pie and bar view and drill down to the underlying episodes.

benchmarking.title: Waiting Time & Referral Insights
benchmarking.description: Analyse waiting times from referral to visit in months, see how many episodes fall into each bucket, and review which referrers send which types of cases. Drill down from any bar or slice to the exact patients behind the pattern.

dashboards.title: Treatment Time Analytics
dashboards.description: Automatically bucket procedure durations (30–400 min) into ranges and get counts, percentages, averages and medians per bucket. See how complex your cases are and how treatment time is distributed across your clinic.

referrals.title: Age & Volume Trends
referrals.description: Get monthly patient volumes and age‑group distributions (0–17, 18–29, 30–44, 45–59, 60+) directly from your registered data. Follow how your patient mix and activity change over time without manual reporting.

security.title: Secure & GDPR-Compliant
security.description: Database-per-tenant isolation, encryption in transit and at rest, RBAC access control, and audit logs. Built for Swedish healthcare data protection requirements.

about.title: Why CareMetrics?
about.paragraph1: Most EHRs and journal systems are economy-focused: they capture what you bill, not the granular treatment and outcome data you need to follow up and improve your care. Production dashboards are useful, but they rarely support real treatment-quality follow-up.
about.paragraph2: CareMetrics is built for follow-up and improvement: granular treatment and outcome data that EHRs don't provide. Structure your episode and outcome data, see quality metrics like retreatment and complication follow-up, and use dashboards to compare over time—so you can make better decisions and improve your treatments.
about.paragraph3: Built for dental clinics, specialist clinics, and clinic groups in Sweden. CareMetrics is an analytics and reporting tool for practice and quality management; it is not a medical device or healthcare service.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to see your clinic more clearly? Let's talk about how CareMetrics can help.
contact.description: CareMetrics is designed for private dental clinics, specialist clinics, and clinic groups that want to work more fact-based and document quality in a structured way.
contact.closing: See your clinic more clearly. Support better decisions with data. Show patients and staff that you work actively with quality.

dataController.title: 1. Data Controller
dataController.description: CareMetrics processes personal data in compliance with GDPR (EU) 2016/679 and Swedish data protection laws.

dataCollection.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollection.description: We collect account information, treatment data you enter, and usage data (IP address, browser type, access logs) necessary to provide the service.

dataUsage.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.description: We use your data to provide and improve our services, generate analytics reports, and ensure security. Legal basis: contractual necessity, legal obligation, and legitimate interests.

dataSharing.title: 4. Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: We do not sell your data. We may share data with service providers under strict agreements, or when required by law.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.description: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, data portability, and object to processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at

security.title: 6. Data Security & Retention
security.description: We implement security measures including encryption and access controls. Data is retained only as long as necessary and securely deleted when no longer needed.

transfers.title: 7. International Transfers
transfers.description: If data is transferred outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place per GDPR requirements.

complaints.title: 8. Complaints
complaints.description: You can lodge a complaint with the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY):

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.description: By using CareMetrics, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree with these Terms, please discontinue use of the service.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.description: CareMetrics is a cloud-based BI and analytics platform for dental clinics, focused on treatment quality. It is an analytics and reporting tool for practice and quality management.

responsibilities.title: 3. Your Responsibilities
responsibilities.description: You must be 18+ and use the service lawfully. You're responsible for your account security and the accuracy of data you enter. You must comply with GDPR and Swedish Patient Data Act when processing healthcare data.

prohibited.title: 4. Prohibited Uses
prohibited.description: Don't use the service illegally, attempt unauthorized access, introduce malware, reverse engineer, or share account credentials.

yourData.title: 5. Your Data
yourData.description: You own your data. We process it only to provide the service. You're responsible for backups. We're not liable for errors in your data.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.description: The service is owned by CareMetrics. Don't copy, modify, or distribute it without permission.

availability.title: 7. Service Availability
availability.description: The service is provided "as is" without warranties. We don't guarantee availability and may modify or discontinue the service at any time.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.description: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CareMetrics is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to fees paid in the preceding 12 months.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.description: You can terminate your account anytime. We may terminate accounts that violate these Terms. Upon termination, your access ends and data may be deleted per our Privacy Policy.

governing.title: 10. Governing Law
governing.description: These Terms are governed by Swedish law. Disputes are subject to Swedish courts.

changes.title: 11. Changes
changes.description: We may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use after changes means acceptance.
